rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Official Form Interrogatories

DEFENDANT SALLY LIU'S Motion To Compel Answers To Official Form Interrogatories is transferred to department 301 to be heard on July 2, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. Moving party is ordered to provide a courtesy copy of the mobbing papers to department301 no later than June 23, 2105 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date and department. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. SILVIA ALVARENGA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Judgmnt On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 23, 2015, line 12. DEFENDANTS SILVIA ALVARENGA and PEDRO HERNANDEZ's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is DENIED. The operative Notice to Quit states in part: "POSSESSION of the premises is also sought pursuant to the Lease Covenants 5. Income Certification." Whether breach of lease covenant was curable is an issue of fact that cannot be resolved by this motion. = (501/REQ)
